channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Ducks to honor fellow O.C. team at promotional night
item.description: If you're a fan of Orange County sports, you're in luck this January. On Jan. 7, the Anaheim Ducks are hosting Angels Night, an event that includes a baseball jersey giveaway for the first 5,000 fans in attendance. The game against the Calgary Flames begins at 7 p.m. Tickets begin at less than $30.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: US women's team star Trinity Rodman says her relationship with father Dennis Rodman is strained
item.description: U.S. women’s soccer team forward Trinity Rodman has opened up about her strained relationship with father Dennis Rodman, saying he is largely absent from her life.
item.dc:creator: Anne M. Peterson, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: What top MLB insider is saying about Detroit Tigers-Alex Bregman rumors
item.description: One of the top insiders for MLB free agency reported some info about the rumors surrounding the Detroit Tigers and Alex Bregman.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: Friedkin Group completes purchase of Everton and becomes 10th US owner in Premier League
item.description: Half of the Premier League is under majority American ownership after Texas-based Friedkin Group completed its 98.8% purchase of Everton on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jets owner Woody Johnson axed trade for star wide receiver because of video game rating: report
item.description: A bombshell report from The Athletic published Thursday cited sources claiming that New York Jets owner Woody Johnson made decisions based on the popular video game, Madden NFL.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lindsey Vonn hits back at critics who think she's crazy to return to ski racing at age 40
item.description: ST. MORITZ, Switzerland (AP) — Lindsey Vonn didn’t just pop into the hospital one day, get a new titanium knee and then decide on the way out that she wanted to return to downhill ski racing.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 2024 obituaries: Notable Bay Area residents who died
item.description: SF Giants stars Willie Mays and Orlando Cepeda, tech pioneer Susan Wojcicki and music legend Phil Lesh are among those who left a mark on the Bay Area in their lifetimes.
item.dc:creator: Bay Area News Group, The Mercury News

item.title: James Madison football star empties the quiver in celebration during bowl game win
item.description: James Madison defensive lineman Eric O'Neill emptied the quiver in celebration amid key players in the Boca Raton Bowl against Western Kentucky.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Caitlin Clark backlash to White privilege remarks proves there's 'issues with race' in US, WNBA great says
item.description: Sue Bird and Megan Rapinoe reacted to the backlash around Caitlin Clark's White privilege comments in an interview with Time magazine last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: David Montgomery seeks 3rd opinion on knee injury as Detroit Lions consider IR
item.description: Detroit Lions tailback David Montgomery says he is seeking a third opinion on his injured knee as the team considers placing him on injured reserve.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: AP Exclusive: Pro tennis player Jenson Brooksby talks about living with autism
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Jenson Brooksby tugged at the right shoulder of his red T-shirt and fiddled with some strands of his dirty blond hair as he spoke to The Associated Press about what he'd like the world — the tennis world, yes, but also everyone else — to know about him.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Michigan team beats well-known coach who called them ‘Nobody U’ and said he’d win by 20
item.description: A Michigan basketball team beat a well-known coach who called them “Nobody U” and said he would win by 20 points.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: IOC publishes manifestos of 7 candidates running to be president and lead Olympics
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — The seven candidates running for International Olympic Committee president had their manifestos published on Thursday, and one is offering to take just half of the eight-year mandate on offer and stand again in 2029.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Red Bull picks Liam Lawson as Max Verstappen's F1 teammate in 2025
item.description: MILTON KEYNES, England (AP) — Liam Lawson will partner world champion Max Verstappen at Red Bull in 2025, the Formula 1 team said on Thursday. Lawson, a New Zealander, replaces Sergio Perez, who was dropped on Wednesday after months of poor results.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hajj-Malik Williams throws 2 TDs passes to help No. 24 UNLV beat Cal 24-13 in the LA Bowl
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Despite losing its starting quarterback after three games and head coach 10 days ago, UNLV had its best season in the Football Bowl Subdivision.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pro Picks: Eagles will cruise past the Commanders and Seahawks will upset the Vikings
item.description: Pro Picks is a weekly column where AP Pro Football Writer Rob Maaddi shares his picks for upcoming games. For all previous Pro Picks, head here. ___ The setup for two Christmas Day games means two games on Saturday in Week 16. They’ll be potential playoff previews.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Boys Basketball: Santa Fe Christian 63, Coronado 39
item.description: Boys basketball action taking place at Coronado High School as the Islanders take on #4 ranked Santa Fe Christian.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Cardinals' eight-time All-Star blocks potential trade to Astros: report
item.description: Nolan Arenado reportedly did not waive his no-trade clause after the St. Louis Cardinals agreed on a deal that would have sent him to the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: La Jolla 55, Army-Navy 47
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Boys hoops in La Jolla with the Vikings hosting Army-Navy from Carlsbad. Great game that went right down to the wire, La Jolla won 52-47. Vikings were lead by Leo Hawkinson with 16. Warriors were lead by Yanler Ramos game high 26 points.
item.dc:creator: Fox 5

item.title: Notre Dame and Indiana get 1st taste of playoff football under the Friday night lights
item.description: Marcus Freeman spent his first two seasons as the Notre Dame coach chasing the playoff dream. This year, he's living it — at home.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Formula 1 team Red Bull drops driver Sergio Perez after four seasons
item.description: Formula 1 team Red Bull has dropped Sergio Perez after months of poor results. Perez has not won a race since April 2023, even as his teammate Max Verstappen has dominated F1, and the 34-year-old Mexican was rarely competitive this season.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Boston's Sports Bar & Restaurant's 'Gather Your Herd' Sweepstakes
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — With the NFL playoffs quickly approaching, Boston’s Pizza is giving six lucky fans a chance to celebrate Denver’s postseason push at the ultimate football watch party. “We’ve got some really nice TVs in our bar,” said Brandon Cramer, Boston’s Pizza general manager.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Caitlin Clark's No. 22 to be retired during February ceremony at Iowa's Carver-Hawkeye Arena
item.description: IOWA CITY, Iowa (AP) — No Iowa Hawkeyes women's basketball player will wear Caitlin Clark's No. 22 again. The number will be retired in a ceremony Feb. 2 at Carver-Hawkeye Arena, the Iowa athletic department announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As Caleb Williams gains experience, Bears must find meaning in final 3 games of dismal 2024 season
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. (AP) — The Chicago Bears continue to get the same result regardless of how they approach the assignment. Quarterback Caleb Williams looked physically and mentally beaten at the end of Monday night’s 30-12 loss to the Minnesota Vikings, the eighth straight Bears defeat.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: The group behind a new European soccer competition has resurfaced. Here's what they propose
item.description: The group behind a proposed breakaway European soccer competition is back. They have a new name for their tournament, too, calling it the Unify League this time.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA unveils new All-Star format featuring four-team tournament
item.description: The NBA 's All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing on Tuesday that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rays call for more money after Pinellas commissioners vote in favor of bonds for new stadium
item.description: Pinellas County commissioners voted in favor of approving bonds for the new Tampa Bay Rays stadium Tuesday evening.
item.dc:creator: Beth Rousseau, WFLA, NBC

item.title: White Sox offseason roadmap: How the club could return to being average
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago White Sox are coming off the worst season in Major League Baseball history and barring Jerry Reinsdorf going Los Angeles Dodgers mode with his wallet, they will likely be a team that finishes well under .500 again in 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Broncos def. Colts 31-13
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— Playoff pressure makes diamonds, and the Denver Broncos proved they can shine when it counts, delivering a dominant second-half performance to defeat the Indianapolis Colts 31-13 on Sunday. The game started with postseason hopes hanging in the balance for the Broncos.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Point guard Dennis Schroder traded by Brooklyn to Golden State
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — By adding Dennis Schroder, the Golden State Warriors believe they have found the perfect backcourt mate to complement Stephen Curry. Curry can't wait to get going in what he expects to be a “seamless transition for him.” “It can help me, it can help us,” Curry said.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saquon Barkley slowed by 'minor' injury, loses ground in pursuit of Dickerson's record
item.description: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley had a setback in his chase of the NFL season rushing record when he appeared slowed by an undisclosed injury.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Giants owner John Mara gets another aerial message trashing his team before loss to Ravens
item.description: New York Giants co-owner John Mara received another aerial message trashing his woeful team before Sunday's 35-14 loss to the Baltimore Ravens. It was the second straight week that a plane was hired to circle the stadium in protest of the Giants’ seventh losing season since 2017.
item.dc:creator: TOM CANAVAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 3 Utah cowboys earn world champion titles at 2024 National Finals Rodeo
item.description: Three cowboys from Utah won world champion titles at the 2024 Wrangler National Finals Rodeo in Las Vegas on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Utah runs road winning streak to six straight with 4-3 victory
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club has become true road warriors. Clayton Keller scored a power-play goal with 43.8 seconds remaining and the Utah Hockey Club rallied to beat the San Jose Sharks 4-3 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Blake Horvath shines as Navy dominates in a 31-13 victory over Bryson Daily and No. 19 Army
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (AP) — This was an Army-Navy game unlike any before it. The teams had combined for 19 victories this season before their annual clash, a record for the rivalry. Of course, only one of them would be responsible for No. 20 — the biggest win of them all. “I think they're like us.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Dosunmu and Giddey lead the Bulls past the struggling Hornets 109-95
item.description: Josh Giddey had 17 points, nine rebounds and seven assists, and the Chicago Bulls beat the struggling Charlotte Hornets 109-95 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Game-worn Wilt Chamberlain Lakers jersey sells for $333K at auction
item.description: A game-worn Wilt Chamberlain jersey from the 1970-71 Los Angeles Lakers playoff run sold for $333,601 at Grey Flannel Auctions’ holiday auction this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5
